title: Rewrite your
homepage
slides.body: Five words up top are quietly losing you deals. Your pipeline tells a better story than your copy does. Here is how to close the gap in an afternoon.

title: Your homepage isn't
broken. It's {{vague.}}
slides.body: Buyers rarely reject you. They fail to understand you fast enough, and then they leave. **Vague copy reads as a vague company.** Below are three lines doing the damage, and the fix for each.

slides.before: We provide comprehensive digital solutions for businesses of all sizes.
after: We get B2B teams from “what do you
even do” to a homepage that closes.
slides.takeaway: Name the outcome, not the category.

slides.before: A platform that helps teams manage their workflows more efficiently.
after: The system your ops team stops

slides.before: Innovative, scalable, best-in-class technology you can trust.
after: Onboarding cut from six weeks to six

title: Say what you do.
Say who breaks without it.
Say it like a human.
slides.body: Do that and your copy stops sounding like everyone else's. Same company. Completely different signal.

title: Find your five words.
slides.body: Get the free Positioning Checklist, the 12-point audit I run on every client before we rewrite a single word. Know exactly where your copy is losing people.
